violations.text: The prep unit in the kitchen was observed not functional. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2025

The area outside by the shed and dumpster area has an accumulation of Rat Burrows. Establishment must work with pest control to eliminate pest activity, and to fill burrows. Establishment is to send photos to RIDOH of areas was filled. New Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2025
Food Items were observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler and freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. (Draws by the roller machine and the back fridge) New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the gaskets on the draw machine and the plastic hang in the walk in have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024
